sections.instruction: Qavslar ichidagi fe'llarning to'g'ri Past Perfect Simple shaklini yozing.
sections.instruction_ru: Вставьте правильную форму Past Perfect Simple глаголов в скобках.

parts.content: By the time I arrived, everyone
leave
Steve
the film, so he didn't come with us to the cinema.
already / see
Tina
doing the housework by seven o'clock, so she called Andrea to tell her she would be late.
not / finish
to Billy when I rang?
you / just / speak
The car broke down just after
we / set off
I didn't eat anything at the party because
at home.
I / already / eat
about the accident before you saw it on TV?
you / hear

sections.instruction: Birinchi gap bilan bir xil ma'noga ega bo'lgan gapni (A yoki B) tanlang.
sections.instruction_ru: Выберите предложение (A или B), которое имеет то же значение, что и первое.

parts.content: We'd had dinner when Wendy arrived.

options: Wendy arrived and then we had dinner.
We had dinner and then Wendy arrived.

parts.content: I read the book after I'd seen the film.

options: I saw the film and then I read the book.
I read the book and then I saw the film.

parts.content: By the time Dad came home, I'd gone to bed.

options: I went to bed before Dad came home.
I went to bed after Dad came home.

parts.content: She didn't go to bed until her mum had come home.

options: She went to bed and then her mum came home.
Her mum came home and then she went to bed.

parts.content: Mr Banks hadn't arrived at the office by the time I got there.
They'd bought the plane tickets before they heard about the cheaper flight.

options: They bought the plane tickets and later they heard about the cheaper flight.
They heard about the cheaper flight and then they bought the plane tickets.

parts.content: The girls had tidied the house when the visitors arrived.

options: The visitors arrived and later the girls tidied the house.
The girls tidied the house and then the visitors arrived.

sections.instruction: Quyidagi so'zlardan foydalanib gaplar tuzing. Fe'llardan biri Past Perfect Simple da bo'lishi kerak.
sections.instruction_ru: Напишите предложения, используя данные слова. Один из глаголов должен быть в Past Perfect Simple.

parts.content: we / just / hear / the news / when / you / ring

answers: We had just heard the news when you rang.
alternateAnswers: We'd just heard the news when you rang.

parts.content: I / already / think / of / that / before / you / suggest / it

answers: I had already thought of that before you suggested it.
alternateAnswers: I'd already thought of that before you suggested it.

parts.content: when / I / turn on / the TV / the programme / already / start

answers: When I turned on the TV, the programme had already started.
alternateAnswers: When I turned on the TV the programme had already started.
When I turned on the TV, the programme'd already started.

parts.content: she / be / hungry / because / she / not / eat / anything / all day

answers: She was hungry because she hadn't eaten anything all day.
alternateAnswers: She was hungry because she had not eaten anything all day.

parts.content: by the time / I / leave / school / I / decide / to become / a musician

answers: By the time I left school, I had decided to become a musician.
alternateAnswers: By the time I left school I had decided to become a musician.
By the time I left school, I'd decided to become a musician.
By the time I left school I'd decided to become a musician.

sections.instruction: Rasmlarga qarang va gaplarni to'ldiring. Past Perfect Continuous shaklini ishlating.
sections.instruction_ru: Посмотрите на картинки и дополните предложения. Используйте форму Past Perfect Continuous.

parts.content: She was tired because she
run
They were hot because they
dance
The garden was flooded because
it / rain / all night

answers: it had been raining all night

parts.content: Did they crash because
drive / too fast

answers: they had been driving too fast

parts.content: When I arrived,
they / wait / for over half an hour

answers: they had been waiting for over half an hour
alternateAnswers: they'd been waiting for over half an hour

parts.content: When I got there,
they / not / wait / long

alternateAnswers: they had not been waiting long

parts.content: I'd only
the washing-up for a few minutes when Clare came home, so she offered to finish it.
Had you already
James his birthday present when we gave him ours?
Gail hadn't
me that she would help me, so I wasn't angry when she didn't.
Mum had
her cup of tea for several minutes before she realised it had salt in it!
We'd
ready all day when they called to say the party had been cancelled.
It was a fantastic experience because I'd never
in a plane before.

sections.instruction: Agar satr to'g'ri bo'lsa, (✓) belgisini qo'ying. Agar satrda ortiqcha so'z bo'lsa, uni yozing.
sections.instruction_ru: Если строка правильная, поставьте галочку (✓). Если в строке есть лишнее слово, напишите его.

parts.content: This morning my exam results finally had came.
I'd been expecting them for the last week. I knew I'd been done quite well, but I was
still nervous as I had opened the envelope. Before I'd had a chance to
look at them, my sister ran up and pulled them out of my hand! She
had read them out one by one. 'English A, maths A, biology A,
French A ...' This was the news I'd been waiting for. I'd got As in
every subject – even geography, which I hadn't been making sure
about! When Mum and Dad heard the news, they immediately started
been shouting for joy. By the time I'd had breakfast, Mum had
already called Grandma and Grandpa and had yet told the neighbours!
